name: Bigfinite
description: Developer of a data analytics and AI platform designed to improve pharma manufacturing processes. The company's platform offers acquisition, recording, visualization, and analysis of manufacturing data for the optimization of industrial processes in a simple, regulated, and traceable way, enabling pharma and other clients to discover new ways to optimize processes, reduce manufacturing quality issues, and enhance regulatory compliance.

name: Alphaus
description: Developer of a software-as-a-service platform designed to seamlessly automate the daily operations of cloud lifecycle management. The company's platform helps AWS (Amazon Web Services), Azure & Google Cloud partners, and user enterprises to understand complicated cloud spend, allocate it to each client or business unit with accuracy, and optimize it with a better way of procurement, enabling businesses to optimize their cloud costs via accounts, tags, products or departments.

name: Barn & Willow
description: Operator of a home decor platform intended to offer custom window draperies and all types of textile products. The company's brand offers a wide selection of custom draperies from a wide range of fabrics, styles, and dimensions that can be custom stitched to the exact dimension and style specifications, enabling customers to purchase home drapery products according to their choice of color, fabric, and dimension.

name: Cirrus Identity
description: Developer of a cloud-hosted identity and access management software designed to focus on higher education. The company uses managed solutions to support multilateral federations to enable participation in InCommon and eduGAIN for identity and service providers, enabling affiliated users like applicants, parents, alumni, and continuing education students to get support for onboarding and authentication.

name: Kitterly
description: Operator of a craft supplies marketplace intended to offer knitting and crochet kits. The company's marketplace offers a wide range of yarns, buttons, ring markers, and needles, enabling consumers to purchase crochet items seamlessly.

name: Drivio
description: Developer of a mobile application intended to track and pay parking tickets. The company's mobile application leverages technology to allow users to pay for parking tickets and also set up reminders for their tickets, enabling customers to easily manage and settle parking violations.

name: Flycrates
description: Operator of an online logistics platform intended to provide international shipping. The company offers a web-based platform, as well as a Chrome extension, enabling users to purchase from Amazon internationally and get delivered to their doorstep.

name: Getlinks
description: Operator of an online recruitment platform intended to connect tech talents with opportunities across Asia. The company's platform helps job seekers to build a digital resume that highlights strengths and achievements to impress potential employers, follow job openings and apply and chat with recruiters, enabling students to find a suitable job and connect with the professional world.

name: LawnGuru
description: Provider of an outside-the-home services marketplace intended to connect consumers with professionals. The company's services include recurring mowing, yard clean-ups, seeding, mulching, weeding, and snow clearing among others, enabling customers to book services instantly, using an artificial intelligence-powered satellite mapping tool, or request competitive quotes from top-rated crews nearby

name: LawTrades
description: Operator of a talent recruitment platform intended to find, hire and work with professional lawyers. The company's platform allows attorneys to become independent, provides the tools to virtually eliminate admin and overhead expenditures and lets businesses hire vetted attorneys for reviewing contracts, filing patents, trademarking and immigration filings, enabling clients to find specific legal projects performed by vetted freelance attorneys at guaranteed fixed prices.

name: MentorCloud
description: Operator of an educational online platform designed for mentoring and knowledge sharing. The company develops a cloud-based platform that helps organizations to match and engage their employees globally with suitable peers, experts, mentors, and filtered content, according to employees' goals, interests, skills, and knowledge needs, enabling human resource leaders to easily identify subject matter experts and rising stars in the organization.

name: Metadata
description: Developer of marketing data analytics software designed to streamline and scale demand generation. The company's platform collects historical sales data for analysis to create profiles for ideal customers and orchestrate the process of accelerating existing opportunities and targeting net new accounts, enabling businesses to offer clients a predictable channel of structured query language and optimize demand generation efforts.

name: Beeketing
description: Operator of a launching platform intended to empower brands to launch, grow, and succeed. The company's ecosystem of products promotes and improves the quality of e-commerce activities in general and cross-border commerce in particular, enabling businesses to plan and execute marketing strategies to increase sales and improve customer relationships automatically.

name: Rapchat
description: Developer of a music-making platform designed to help artists record and share songs from the phone. The company's platform provides users with access to a social network of audience and artists that help drive connectivity and collaboration via its mobile recording studio that features various music-making tools, enabling artists to make content and deliver it directly to their audience with ease.

name: Set Scouter
description: Operator of a scouting marketplace intended to connect filmmakers with property owners. The company's platform connects filmmakers looking for sets with landlords looking to rent out their space for production, enabling clients to easily find film-ready spaces catering to production needs.

name: Simpliroute
description: Developer of a navigation platform designed for route optimization services. The company's platform provides ways to help any last-mile company make their deliveries efficiently by automating their process with an easy-to-use platform and automates their process with an easy-to-use platform, enabling businesses to organize their deliveries and visits with minimum effort.

name: SynapseMX
description: We help aircraft maintenance teams work better together to get planes back in the air sooner.

name: Woowup
description: Developer of a cloud-based online marketing platform designed for automating customer retention campaigns and leveraging existing customer data. The company's platform converts the fans of a company into customers using a loyalty program on the website of the company or the Facebook fan page, allows integration with any sales channel, identifies the user as a single channel, and manages all point purchase and redemption interactions, enabling retailers to retain customers using automated marketing tools and artificial intelligence to predict purchases.

name: Fulfil.IO
description: Provider of an online inventory management application intended to simplify businesses. The company offers a web-based platform and mobile application that simplifies processes for distributors and retailers with inventory management integrations.

name: PupBox
description: Provider of a monthly subscription box created to deliver educational material, treats, toys and accessories for dogs. The company's subscription box offers puppy safe products personalized by puppy age and physical characteristics and educational material with each box to help through the many training steps and developmental changes, enabling new puppy owners to train and pamper their puppy throughout puppyhood.

name: Mahmee
description: Provider of a prenatal and postpartum care management platform designed to deliver personalized, ongoing education and live support to new families everywhere. The company's care management platform is a collaboration between maternity, infant care practitioners and large health systems to connect and integrate care across a highly fragmented maternal care system comprised of hospitals, insurers, health systems and private practices, enabling patients to reduce hospital re admissions and increases breastfeeding rates.

name: Whiplash Merchandising
description: Developer of an e-commerce software designed to offer order management and warehouse management services. The company's e-commerce software offers integration, order management system (OMS) as well as warehouse management system (WMS) capabilities to emerging brands along with real-time visibility and OMS capabilities, labor management and order fulfillment services, enabling companies to enhance their operations with expanded customer offerings and responsiveness.

name: Cooleaf
description: Provider of an online marketplace for local fitness classes. The company provides local fitness businesses with an online marketing tool and audience, and provides fitness consumers with portal for fitness programs near them, and operating within their scheduling needs.

name: Moveha
description: Developer of a rental website designed to offer reliable property information and reservation services. The company's rental website is integrated with a platform which helps the students to search and find off-campus housing as well as provides relocation options, sharing rooms or helps them in leasing their own properties, enabling students to find accommodations and relocate.

name: Clicky
description: Provider of an online reservation platform for sport facilities. The company helps amateur sport players to find sport venues available on real time and sport facility owners to optimise their field rental.

name: Piper Inc.
description: Developer of a computer kit designed to let children assemble their own computers. The company's computer kit is pre-installed with 10 worlds that interact with the computer kit while being built, utilizing in-game directions for how to add on to the hardware and sensors in order to advance in the game, enabling kids to create with code and electronics and learn the basics of technology through tangible play.
